subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the Lion - upon him be My glory - and give unto him the glad-tidings of the mercy that hath descended from the heaven of God's loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الاسد علیه بهائی و نبشره بالرحمة التی نزلت من سماء عنایة الله
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @naming of children; of individuals
